title: Fix decider-stale-skip schema: add status:'pending' + recommended_lane:'analyst-mode-1b' to the STALE-ASSESS inbox writer in monitor/prompts/reference/decider-intake.md.
scope_authority: Author PROP-046 (or amendment to an existing PROP if appropriate) with concrete patch to decider-intake.md. Operator + cowork-claude apply. Tinker does NOT self-apply prompt edits.

bug_summary.observed_event: Analyst run 2026-05-17T~17:30Z surfaced two findings about monitor/analyst/attention-inbox.json: (1) three operator-resolved items lingered past PROP-022 phase 4 archive cycle (operator-direct issue, since fixed in commit 3688bbe); (2) six STALE-ASSESS items use non-conforming schema — they have `resolved: false` but NO `status` field, causing Mode 2b dispatcher to fail to classify them correctly.
bug_summary.root_cause: The decider-stale-skip writer in monitor/prompts/reference/decider-intake.md (Step 1a, PROP-028 Mech A, ~lines 240-253) emits attention-inbox items with the shape `{id, prediction_id, ..., created_by: 'decider-stale-skip', created_at, resolved: false}`. The schema lacks `status` and `recommended_lane` fields. When analyst's Mode 2b dispatcher iterates the inbox, items without `status` get treated as 'unknown lane' and either re-flagged every run (noise) or silently skipped (work loss).
bug_summary.semantic_intent: STALE-ASSESS items are prediction re-assessment work — Mode 1b semantics (analyst writes verdicts on dome's predictions). NOT Mode 2b semantics (HNOTE-derived operator-directives, pipeline-issue flags). The Mode 2b dispatcher correctly skipped them as 'not my lane,' but the items remain visible in the inbox with no consumer.
bug_summary.in_session_fix_applied: Commit 3688bbe (operator-direct, 2026-05-17): added status:'pending', recommended_lane:'analyst-mode-1b', schema_fix_at, schema_fix_by, schema_fix_note to the 6 existing STALE-ASSESS items. This unsticks the current items but does NOT prevent recurrence — next decider-stale-skip fire will produce more schema-non-conforming items.

operator_preferences_for_proposal: Minimal patch — this is a 2-line addition to the object literal in the writer's source code block. PROP should reflect that scope; no need for elaborate architecture.

Verify-on-write — PROP should specify the exact lines to add (`status: 'pending'` + `recommended_lane: 'analyst-mode-1b'`) and the surrounding context, similar to how PROP-014-amendment-001 specified additive edits.
Counter-arguments mandatory (operator preference, even for small fixes — keeps thinking visible).
Other-side-of-the-argument optional (small fix, may not warrant).

tasks_for_tinker.description: Read monitor/prompts/reference/decider-intake.md around line 240-258 (the appendAttentionInbox call inside Step 1a). Confirm the current object literal has resolved:false and no status. If the structure has changed (e.g., another writer was added elsewhere), document the divergence.

Specify the exact 2-line addition to the object literal: status: 'pending', recommended_lane: 'analyst-mode-1b'. Show the before/after object shape. If you think a different field name is better (e.g., target_mode instead of recommended_lane), justify in the PROP. Be opinionated.

Grep for other writers to attention-inbox.json in the prompts directory. There may be similar schema-omission bugs in decider's other writers (e.g., the ones that author PROP029-ORPHAN-* items, ATT-*-DUPLICATE-MODE-1-CONCURRENCY items, etc.). Same-class fix worth bundling if found.
tasks_for_tinker.deliverable: Audit results in PROP's regression_check section.

tasks_for_tinker.description: Standard mandatory counter-arguments: (a) why not just delete the field and remove the writer (steelman doing-nothing)? (b) why this specific lane label and not a different routing convention? Rebut each.

in_scope_for_tinker: Author one PROP (next available number — likely PROP-046) targeting monitor/prompts/reference/decider-intake.md
Bundle similar schema-omissions in other inbox writers if found (Task 3)
Mark the directive completed via DIRECTIVE-LIFECYCLE additive-edit exception
out_of_scope_for_tinker: Do NOT self-apply the prompt edit. PROP design only — operator + cowork-claude apply.
Do NOT change Mode 1b vs Mode 2b dispatcher semantics. The dispatcher is correct; only the writer schema needs fixing.
Do NOT redesign the STALE-ASSESS check itself (PROP-028 Mech A). It works; only the inbox-item shape needs adjustment.

DIRECTIVE-20260517-002 (analyst claim discipline — different pipeline, similar small-fix style)
related_props: PROP-022 phase 4 (attention-inbox archive convention — sibling cleanup target)

deadline_target: Next tinker scheduled run (daily 03:30 local) or earlier via operator manual trigger. Low priority — current workaround (in-session schema fix) holds for the 6 existing items; only blocks if decider-stale-skip fires again.
